Admin.title: Admin Moderation
Admin.subtitle: Review and validate new causes submitted to the platform.
Admin.creator: Creator
Admin.noPending: No pending causes found. Great job!
Admin.responsibilityText: As an administrator, you are responsible for ensuring all causes meet our community guidelines. Verification updates the status on-chain, signaling trust to potential contributors. Rejection will cancel the campaign and prevent further contributions.

About.pageSubtitle: A decentralized launchpad where the community validates causes through transparent, on-chain participation.
About.whatIsBody: ProofOfHeart is an open platform built on the Stellar blockchain that lets anyone submit a cause and have it validated by the community. Every vote, donation, and outcome is recorded on-chain — giving contributors full transparency into how funds are raised and used.
About.step1Body: Describe your cause, set a funding goal, and submit it for community review.
About.step2Body: Wallet holders vote to approve or reject the cause. Verified causes move to active fundraising.
About.step3Body: Donate to causes you believe in and track every transaction on the Stellar explorer.
About.step4Body: Funded causes are marked on-chain. Unfunded causes trigger automatic refunds to contributors.
About.whoCanBody: Anyone with a Stellar wallet can vote on causes and contribute funds. Cause creators connect their wallet and fill out a short form to submit their proposal.
About.faq1A: Yes. The smart contracts and frontend are publicly available on GitHub.
About.faq2A: Any Stellar-compatible wallet works, including Freighter and LOBSTR.
About.faq3A: If a cause does not reach its funding goal, the smart contract automatically returns contributions to donors.
About.faq4A: Platform administrators review submissions before they go live. The community then votes to signal broader trust.
